verses.text: Manasseh in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmlenih pha a, amah in Jerusalem-ah kum sawmngalenga sung a uk hi. Ama nu' min Hefzibah ahi hi
Topa in Israel mite' mai-ah a hawlkhiat minamte' gamtatna a kihhuaite mah bangin Topa' muhna-ah amah a sia gamta hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in a pa Hezekiah' suksiatsa mualtunga biaknate lamkik hi. Tua ciangin amah in Baal-a' dingin biakna taute phut a, Israel kumpi Ahab' bawl bangin Asherah milim khat bawl a, vantunga om nate khempeuh bia-in tuate' na a sem hi
Tua ciangin Topa in, “Jerusalem-ah ka min ka koih ding hi,” a cihna Topa' biakinn sungah amah in biakna taute lam hi
Tua ciangin amah in Topa' biakinn tual nihte tungah vantunga om nate khempeuh-a' dingin biakna taute a lam hi
Tua ciangin amah in biakna-in a tapa hal a, aisanna leh mailam thugen kholhnate semin, vankah theite leh aisante tawh na semkhawm hi. Topa' muhna-ah amah a sia tampi gamta a, amah hehsak hi

Tua ciangin Topa in David leh a tapa Solomon tungah, “Israel minam khempeuh sung panin ka teelkhiat hih biakinn sung leh Jerusalem-ah ka min ka koih tawntung ding hi. Amaute ka thupiaksa khempeuh tawh kizui, leh ka nasempa Moses in amaute a piak thukham khempeuh tawh kizui-in gamtat ding a kingaihsut nak uh leh, a pu a pate uh tungah ka piak gamsungah Israel mite mi vakvai ka hisak nawn kei ding hi,” a cihna biakinn sungah amah in ama bawlsa a kiseek Asherah milim a koih hi
Ahih hangin amaute in thu ngailo uh a, Topa in Israel-te' mai-ah a suksiat minamte' gamtatna sangin a siahuaizaw a gamtatna dingun Manasseh in amaute a zol hi
Tua ciangin Topa in kamsangte ahi a nasemte' tung tawnin gen a
“Judah kumpipa Manasseh in hih a kihhuai nate sem a, ama ma-a Amor mite' gamtatna sangin a siazaw-in na semin a milimte tawh Judah mite zong khialsak khin hi
Tua ahih ciangin Israel Pasian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: En un, a za mite khempeuh' bilte a vut ding siatna Jerusalem leh Judah tungah ka tungsak ding hi
Keimah in Samaria leh Ahab leh ama suante gim ka piak bangin Jerusalem tungah gimna ka tungsak ding hi. Tua ciangin mi khat in pakan a nul bangin keimah in Jerusalem nulin ka lumlet ding hi
Tua ciangin keimah in ka mi a omlaite paiikhia-in amau' galte tungah ka pia ding a, amaute pen a galte' mat ding mi leh vankiate suak ding uh hi
bang hang hiam cih leh a pu a pate uh Egypt panin hong paikhiata kipan tuni dongin keima muhna-ah a sia gamta-in kei hong hehsak uh hi,” a ci hi

Tua thamloin Topa' muhna-ah amaute a sia a gamtatna dingun amah in Judah mite a khialhsak banah, Jerusalem mong khat pan mong khat sisan tawh a kidimsak dongin Manasseh in mawhna baanglo mi tampi a that hi
Manasseh' sepna a omlaite, a hih khempeuh, leh ama hihsa a khialhna, Judah Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Manasseh si a, Uzza' huansung, ama inn huansungah kivui hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Amon in a uk hi.
Amon in uk ding a kipatin kum sawmnihlenih pha a, amah in Jerusalem-ah kum nih sung uk hi. Ama nu' min Meshullemeth hi a, Jotbah khuami Haruz' tanu ahi hi
A pa Manasseh' gamtat bangin Topa' muhna-ah amah a sia gamta hi
Amah in a pa' khekhap khempeuh tawn a, a pa in a na a sepsak milimte' na mah semin tuate a bia hi
Amah in a pu a pate' Pasian, Topa nusia a, Topa' lampi tawnlo hi
Tua ciangin Amon' nasemte in amah sawmsim uh a, ama inn sungah kumpipa a that uh hi
Ahih hangin tua gammite in Kumpi Amon a sawmsimte khempeuh that leuleu uh a, tua ciangin tua gammite in ama tangin a tapa Josiah kumpi-in a koih uh hi
Tu-in Amon' hihsa a gamtatna a omlaite pen Judah Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi
Tua ciangin Uzza' huansung ama hanah amah kivui a, ama tangin a tapa Josiah in a uk hi.
